notes.body: Re: Tropical Smoothie dumpster mess at 2065 — reached out to Pam (property mgr); trash is included in the rent, 2065 pays it (not split). Keep documenting daily; send photos if it persists so she can push a resolution. Standing: KPI Ranking — 60% of score = Secret Shop scores + Customer complaints + Ticket times. File hub tickets for any outside vendor work.

Shared July 2026 FG Daily Report — use it to track performance daily and maximize YOUR BONUS. Open the 2065 sheet; July budget at the bottom. Standing: Power of One — Ops Manual is single source of truth; develop two future GMs/year, min six Shift Leaders; Halo Effect + Suggestive Selling; Large soda 30 cents more.
Serina Gaskins pay card has been assigned. Resolved. (Phone still pending in the employee directory.)
PFG next-day delivery orders must be entered before 11:00 AM daily. Don't miss the window heading into July 4.

6/30 deposit shows $0.00 with Over/Short -$695.56 (book cash $695.56) — verify the 6/30 bank deposit was made and enter it in CrunchTime. Task Alert (6/30) + Labor/COGS Review (W/E Jul 5) open. COGS Flash W/E Jul 5: 25.8%.
